---
title: "MESI CO2 Manipulation Bibliography"
author: "Jan Ziegler"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document

```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)   # for working with ease

# Set the working directory according to your file location !!! This link has to be checked!
setwd("~/GECO_Bern/projects/mesi-db")

# Read in the CSV files
mesi_bibliography <- read.csv("~/GECO_Bern/projects/mesi-db/data/mesi_bibliography.csv")
df_experiments_co2 <- read.csv("~/GECO_Bern/projects/mesi-db/data/df_experiments_co2.csv")

# Print first few rows of each data frame to check the data
head(mesi_bibliography)
head(df_experiments_co2)


# Add the bibtexkey column to mesi_bibliography
mesi_bibliography <- mesi_bibliography |> 
  mutate(bibtexkey = paste0("@", citation))

# Print first few rows of the updated mesi_bibliography to check the new column
head(mesi_bibliography)

# Join the two data frames and select for unique citations 
df_experiments_co2 <- df_experiments_co2 |>
  left_join(mesi_bibliography)|>
  unique()
head(df_experiments_co2)

unique_citations <- df_experiments_co2 |> distinct(citation, .keep_all = TRUE)

#write.csv(unique_citations, "data/unique_citations_co2.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```
